$description: Portable schema for the Lark 'FrnDOS Agentic Workflow Management' tasklist. The bootstrap script creates these sections + custom fields in the user's Lark tenant and stores the resulting GUIDs in the local workspace (.lark-sync.json). Agents reference sections/fields by NAME and resolve to GUIDs at call time. Phase is encoded as section membership (Kanban lane), not a custom field.

sections.$description: Phase Kanban lanes. Order matters — Lark shows them left-to-right. 'Brainstorming' must be the default section so new features land there on /workflow start.

custom_fields.name: Feature slug
custom_fields.description: Kebab-case unique key. Matches the workflow feature_slug.

custom_fields.name: Source PRD
custom_fields.description: Lark doc URL (original brief) or local path for dev-authored PRDs.

custom_fields.name: Phase status
custom_fields.description: Status of the current phase. idle = entered but not started. inprogress = agent actively working. completed != advance — workflow stays on the phase until the user explicitly triggers transition.

custom_fields.name: Impl strategy
custom_fields.description: Implementation strategy. 'implementation_only' = jump straight to full implementation; 'wireframe_then_implementation' = build web UI with mock/static data on the feature branch first, then swap stubs for real API calls.

custom_fields.name: Parent feature
custom_fields.description: If this feature is a P0/P1 split of a parent PRD, the parent feature slug.

custom_fields.name: Wiki PRD
custom_fields.description: URL of the synced, agent-maintained PRD wiki page (in Agentic's PRD section). Updated on every local docs/prd/<slug>.md save. Distinct from Source PRD (which is the original stakeholder input).

wiki.$description: Shared wiki structure under the team's Lark wiki space. Bootstrap creates these if missing; agents read node_tokens from .lark-sync.json at runtime. Space ID is tenant-specific and captured when linking.
wiki.root_description_intro: The shared hub for frndOS agentic-workflow activity. Every feature driven through /workflow gets tracked here automatically.

children.name: Agentic's PRD
children.purpose: Canonical synced PRDs. One docx per feature, titled <slug>. Content is mirrored from local docs/prd/<slug>.md at every save. Humans MUST NOT edit these pages directly — they get overwritten. Contains only the final PRD — no brainstorming / Q&A / scratch work.

children.name: User's Area
children.purpose: Per-engineer workspaces. One sub-page per user, named '<Name>'s Universe'. Each user page has per-feature subpages containing brainstorming artifacts (docs, tables, diagrams, bases, attachments) — whatever the engineer wants to share. Humans edit these freely; the agent only creates the empty scaffolding on first /workflow start per feature.

per_user_subtree.$description: Created when a user first runs /workflow start. Name derived from the current workspace's worker field.

per_feature_subtree.$description: Created when the user starts a new feature. Empty folder — user populates with free-form content via Lark UI.
